## Recipes.scaleRecipeByFactor() function

Scales a recipe by a multiplicative factor

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function scaleRecipeByFactor(recipe: IRecipe, factor: number, options?: IRecipeScaleOptions): Result<IScaledRecipe>;
```
